existing_features.title: Add a `proxyUrl` React Query mutation in `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` that calls the backend `proxyUrl` actor method, parses the response, and returns the proxied content for rendering.

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement a backend `proxyUrl` function in the Motoko actor that accepts a URL string, performs an HTTP outcall to fetch the resource, and returns the response body (HTML/content) along with relevant headers (content-type, status).

Wire the direct URL proxy mutation into `BrowserLayout.tsx` so that when the user enters a URL (rather than a search query) in the address bar, the app calls `proxyUrl` and renders the returned content inside `ProxyContent`.
